notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: March 15, approved by UAE Ministerial Council for Development (Sheikh Mansour bin Zayed), timed to Federal Child Rights Law No. 3/2016 (Wadeema Law) gazette publication.

Verified the Wadeema Law backstory (named for a child whose abuse/death case moved national legislation, 23-article law) via multiple independent sources (uaelegislation.gov.ae, familylaw.ae) — handled with respectful, factual framing, no graphic detail, per the sensitive-topic content standard.
Explicitly distinguished from gulf-childrens-day (Jan 15, GCC-wide) per backlog instruction — different date, different scope, same-sounding name causes real confusion.
Not an official holiday — stated directly in FAQ.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ae), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
